ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., CMU/MIT, AFW) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was last updated */,
  "total_images" INTEGER /* Total number of images in the dataset */,
  "total_faces" INTEGER /* Total number of faces detected in the dataset */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Average resolution of images in the dataset */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the dataset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the dataset */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the dataset was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_properties" TEXT /* Properties of the image (e.g., grayscale, color, in-the-wild) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was created */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "image_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the image */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the image was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_image_properties FOREIGN KEY ("image_properties") REFERENCES image_properties ("property_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "faces" (
  "face_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each face */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the face belongs to */,
  "face_properties" TEXT /* Properties of the face (e.g., frontal, profile) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the face was detected */,
  "face_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the detected face */,
  "face_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the detected face */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the face was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("face_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faces_face_properties FOREIGN KEY ("face_properties") REFERENCES face_properties ("property_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faces_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "face_id" INTEGER /* ID of the face the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., 6landmarks, bounding box) */,
  "annotation_data" TEXT /* Data of the annotation (e.g., coordinates, attributes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was created */,
  "annotation_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the annotation */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the annotation was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotation_type FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_type") REFERENCES annotation_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_face_id FOREIGN KEY ("face_id") REFERENCES faces ("face_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., grayscale, color) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the property */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "face_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., frontal, profile) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the property */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation type (e.g., 6landmarks, bounding box) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation type */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the annotation type */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the annotation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the version */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the version was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the metric */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the metric was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_trained_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the model was trained */,
  "last_deployed_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the model was deployed */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_datasets" (
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the evaluation was updated */,
  "evaluated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_datasets_evaluated_by FOREIGN KEY ("evaluated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_datasets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
